name: Holly Rose Flan
recipeIngredient: 4 Ounces Bought Or Homemade Shortcrust Pastry, For The Case
2 Ounces Almond Paste, Bought Or Homemade
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 7 inch flan ring on a baking tray.
2. Roll out pastry thinly and line the ring.
3. Spread jam evenly over the base.
4. Cream butter with sugar until light and fluffy. Add almond essence.
5. Beat in whole egg, then stir in ground almonds.
6. Fold in flour alternately with cold milk.
7. Spoon filling into flan case and smooth the top with a knife.
8. Bake at just above the centre of a moderately hot oven (400 F or Gas Mark 6) for 35 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from oven and carefully lift off the flan ring. Allow to cool completely.
9. To make topping, beat cream and cold milk together until thick. Stir in rose hip syrup.
10. Pour topping over the cooled flan, piling it high and decorating with holly leaves (green almond paste) and berries (red almond paste).
11. Chill lightly before serving.
